'''Bryexx''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Varvenna sector/Legends|Varvenna sector]].

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], it was led by [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Yndis Mylore]], who was also [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] of the sector.

{{Planet-stub}}
